description: Cross-platform hooks for AI-assisted development workflow

_notes.platforms: Valid values: cursor, claude, gemini, copilot
_notes.cursor_note: Cursor does support blocking hooks (preToolUse, beforeShellExecution, beforeReadFile, beforeMCPExecution) with failClosed:true. Current setup deploys only auto-format → afterFileEdit/afterTabFileEdit; protect-secrets relies on Husky pre-commit for now.
_notes.copilot_note: VSCode/Copilot reads .github/hooks/hooks.json with PascalCase event names + required type:'command' field. Matchers are parsed but NOT enforced by VSCode (hooks run on every tool use). Notification event is not supported.
_notes.timeout_units: Source uses seconds. Adapters convert: Claude/Cursor/Copilot keep seconds; Gemini multiplies by 1000 (ms).
_notes.sync_behavior: sync.sh --only=hooks reads 'platforms' field to generate platform-specific configs
_notes.event_support: SessionStart and Stop are emitted only by the claude adapter; the gemini/cursor/copilot adapters do not generate those events even if a hook lists them in 'platforms'.

notify.description: Desktop notification when the agent needs attention or finishes a task.

auto-format.description: Run prettier on the edited file after each Edit/Write. Cursor/Copilot deploy this best-effort; Husky pre-commit guarantees formatting at commit time.

protect-secrets.description: Block reads/edits to sensitive files (.env, .key, .pem, secrets/, credentials/).

frontmatter-guard.description: Enforce YAML frontmatter on .md files under docs/, .agents/rules/, .agents/skills/. Blocks creation without frontmatter; warns on stale last_updated. Claude reads the JSON decision; other platforms block via non-zero exit.

load-context.description: Load project context at session start: PROJECT_TYPE, DTC_ACTIVE, stale docs count, ecosystem artifact counts. Only Claude's adapter currently emits SessionStart hooks.

validate-ecosystem-counts.description: At session end, count actual artifacts under .agents/ and report drift vs. CLAUDE.md. Only Claude's adapter currently emits Stop hooks.
